general.approximate_token_desc: Use a faster approximation for token counting to improve performance (may be slightly less accurate).
general.chat_link_desc: External chat/support link shown in the UI.
general.display_in_currency_desc: Show usage and quotas as currency in the UI, based on the configured conversion.
general.display_unit_desc: Choose how quotas are displayed: Token count, USD, or CNY. Changes take effect globally.
general.unit_token_desc: Show quota as token count — the most intuitive view for API usage.
general.display_token_stat_desc: Display token statistics in logs and dashboards when available.
general.log_consume_enabled_desc: Record usage/consumption logs. Turn off to reduce storage overhead.
general.quota_per_unit_desc: Conversion ratio for currency display. Higher value makes each $ represent more quota.
general.retry_times_desc: Automatic retry attempts for upstream requests on transient errors.
general.title: General Settings
general.top_up_link_desc: External link for users to purchase or top up quota.

logs.clear_warning: This will permanently delete all logs before the selected date.
logs.description: Clear historical logs to free up storage space
logs.title: Log Management

monitoring.automatic_disable_channel_desc: Automatically disable channels that show sustained failures.
monitoring.automatic_enable_channel_desc: Automatically re‑enable previously disabled channels when healthy.
monitoring.channel_disable_threshold_desc: Failure rate threshold (percentage) to auto‑disable a channel. Default 5%.
monitoring.description: Configure monitoring thresholds and channel management
monitoring.quota_remind_threshold_desc: When remaining quota falls below this value, users will be reminded.
monitoring.title: Monitoring & Channel Settings

quota.description: Configure user quota and invitation rewards
quota.pre_consumed_quota_desc: Quota reserved at request start to avoid abuse. Unused part is returned after billing.
quota.quota_for_invitee_desc: Quota reward granted to the invitee upon successful registration.
quota.quota_for_inviter_desc: Quota reward granted to the inviter after a successful invite.
quota.quota_for_new_user_desc: Initial quota granted to each newly registered user.
quota.title: Quota Settings

branding.description: Configure system name, logo, and visual appearance
branding.logo_url_desc: Logo image URL displayed in the header/login screens.
branding.system_name_desc: System display name shown in the UI and emails.
branding.theme_fixed_desc: Only the Modern theme is supported. The theme cannot be changed.
branding.title: System Branding

content.about_desc: Content for the About page. Markdown supported.
content.description: Configure notices, about page, and home page content
content.footer_desc: Footer content rendered site‑wide. HTML allowed; use responsibly.
content.home_page_desc: Content displayed on the home page. Markdown supported.
content.notice_desc: Site‑wide announcement content shown to all users. Markdown supported.
content.title: Content Management

updates.description: Check for updates and manage system version
updates.title: System Updates

profile_info.description: Update your personal information and account settings.
profile_info.email_help: Changing email requires verification. Send a code to the new address and confirm it below.
profile_info.send_code_success: Verification code sent. Check your inbox.
profile_info.title: Profile Information

password.description: Use a strong, unique password as a fallback sign-in method.
password.title: Password

settings.description: Configure your account and system settings
settings.title: Settings

descriptions.About: About page content (markdown/HTML supported by frontend rendering).
descriptions.AutomaticDisableChannelEnabled: Automatically disable channels that show sustained failures.
descriptions.AutomaticEnableChannelEnabled: Automatically re‑enable previously disabled channels when healthy.
descriptions.ChannelDisableThreshold: Failure rate threshold (percentage) to auto‑disable a channel. Default 5%.
descriptions.ChatLink: External chat/support link shown in the UI.
descriptions.EmailDomainRestrictionEnabled: Only allow registrations from domains listed below.
descriptions.EmailDomainWhitelist: Comma-separated allowed email domains (e.g., gmail.com, example.com).
descriptions.EmailVerificationEnabled: Require email verification for actions like registration or password reset.
descriptions.Footer: Footer text or HTML displayed site‑wide.
descriptions.HomePageContent: Content displayed on the home page.
descriptions.LogConsumeEnabled: Record usage/consumption logs. Turn off to reduce storage overhead.
descriptions.Logo: Logo URL displayed in the header/login screens.
descriptions.MessagePusherAddress: Endpoint of the alert/notification pusher service for log events.
descriptions.MessagePusherToken: Authentication token for the alert/notification pusher. Stored securely and never displayed.
descriptions.Notice: Site‑wide announcement content shown to all users.
descriptions.PasswordLoginEnabled: Allow users to sign in with email and password. Disable to require OAuth or other providers.
descriptions.PasswordRegisterEnabled: Allow new users to register with email and password.
descriptions.RegisterEnabled: Master switch for user registration. Turn off to stop all new sign-ups.
descriptions.RetryTimes: Automatic retry attempts for upstream requests on transient errors.
descriptions.SMTPAccount: SMTP username or account email used to authenticate.
descriptions.SMTPFrom: From address used in outgoing emails (e.g., no-reply@yourdomain).
descriptions.SMTPPort: SMTP server port (e.g., 587 for STARTTLS, 465 for SMTPS).
descriptions.SMTPServer: SMTP server hostname for sending emails.
descriptions.SMTPToken: SMTP password or application token used to authenticate. Stored securely and never displayed.
descriptions.ServerAddress: Public base URL of this server (used in links/callbacks).
descriptions.SystemName: System display name shown in the UI and emails.
descriptions.TopUpLink: External link for users to purchase or top up quota.

authentication.description: Control how users sign up and sign in to your workspace.
authentication.title: Authentication & Registration

branding.description: Customize the look and feel of the product experience.
branding.title: Branding & Content

channels.description: Automatically react to upstream channel health and retry behavior.
channels.title: Channels & Reliability

links.description: Control external links exposed to your end users.
links.title: Links

other.description: Configuration keys that are not yet categorized.
other.title: Other Settings

system_settings.no_description: No description available for this setting yet.
system_settings.no_options: No options available or insufficient permissions.
system_settings.sensitive_hint: Stored value is hidden. Enter a new value to overwrite the existing secret.
system_settings.title: System Settings
